title: Robin's Apoli Additions
description: An apoli addon that adds some features I deemed useful
body:
### <ins>Robin's Apoli Additions</ins>



This addon is an abstraction of one of my deprecated mods CCPacks, where I have extracted all Apoli-specific parts, and created this addon.

 

A short overview of the features added:

- Choices; Functionally Similar to [Origins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins) GUI, with some additional features that I prefer.

- Some Power types that i have used in a few different origins I've worked on.

- Data Driven Keybinds.

- Registered Actions

- Power and Action tags.

- And More!

 

[Here you can find Robin's Apoli Addition wiki](https://raa-docs.readthedocs.io/en/latest/)
